special_days.name: Special Day Prayers
special_days.desc: Prayers for holy nights and festivals

1.title: Morning Prayer
1.meaning: We have entered the morning and so has the kingdom of Allah. Praise belongs to Allah.

2.title: Evening Prayer
2.meaning: We have entered the evening and so has the kingdom of Allah. Praise belongs to Allah.

3.title: Sleep Prayer
3.meaning: O Allah! In Your name I die and live.

4.title: Leaving Home Prayer
4.meaning: In the name of Allah, I put my trust in Allah.

5.title: Entering Home Prayer
5.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for the best entry and the best exit.

6.title: Ayatul Kursi
6.meaning: Allah, there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence.

7.title: Glorification Prayer
7.meaning: Glory be to Allah and His is the praise.

8.title: Morning-Evening Protection
8.meaning: In the name of Allah with whose name nothing on earth or in heaven can cause harm.

9.title: Health Prayer
9.meaning: O Allah! Grant me health in my body.

10.title: Seeking Forgiveness
10.meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah and I repent to Him.

11.title: Salawat
11.meaning: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad.

12.title: Contentment Prayer
12.meaning: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord.

13.title: Praise Prayer
13.meaning: All praise is due to Allah.

14.title: Seeking Wellbeing
14.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for wellbeing.

15.title: Gratitude Prayer
15.meaning: O Allah! All praise and thanks are Yours.

16.title: Halal Sustenance Prayer
16.meaning: O Allah! Suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful.

17.title: Anxiety Protection
17.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from worry and grief.

18.title: Blessing Prayer
18.meaning: O Allah! Bless what You have provided us.

19.title: Pure Sustenance Prayer
19.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for pure sustenance.

20.title: Doors of Mercy Prayer
20.meaning: O Allah! Open for me the doors of Your mercy.

21.title: Gratitude for Blessings
21.meaning: My Lord! Inspire me to be grateful for Your blessings.

22.title: Wealth Prayer
22.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for sufficiency.

23.title: Lawful Earnings Prayer
23.meaning: O Allah! Provide me with lawful sustenance.

24.title: Ease Prayer
24.meaning: O Allah! There is no ease except what You make easy.

25.title: Hasbunallah
25.meaning: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.

27.title: Taqwa and Solution
27.meaning: Whoever fears Allah, He will make a way out for him.

28.title: Family Happiness Prayer
28.meaning: Our Lord! Grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes.

29.title: Marriage Blessing
29.meaning: May Allah bless you and send blessings upon you.

30.title: Righteous Offspring Prayer
30.meaning: My Lord! Grant me righteous offspring from Your presence.

31.title: Parents Prayer
31.meaning: My Lord! Have mercy on them as they raised me when I was small.

33.title: Prayer Establishment
33.meaning: My Lord! Make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants.

34.title: Hellfire Protection
34.meaning: Our Lord! Avert from us the punishment of Hell.

35.title: Mercy Prayer
35.meaning: Our Lord! Grant us mercy from Yourself.

36.title: Heart Steadfastness
36.meaning: Our Lord! Do not let our hearts deviate.

37.title: Neighbor Reconciliation
37.meaning: O Allah! Reconcile between us and our neighbors.

38.title: Submission Prayer
38.meaning: Our Lord! Make us submissive to You.

39.title: Good in Both Worlds
39.meaning: Our Lord! Give us good in this world and in the Hereafter.

40.title: Satan Protection
40.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan.

41.title: Mashallah Prayer
41.meaning: What Allah has willed, there is no power except with Allah.

42.title: Declaration of Faith
42.meaning: There is no deity except Allah, Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.

43.title: Complete Words Protection
43.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah's perfect words from the evil of what He has created.

44.title: Healing Ruqyah
44.meaning: In the name of Allah, I perform ruqyah on you.

45.title: Surah An-Nas
45.meaning: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.

46.title: Islamic Nature Prayer
46.meaning: We have entered the morning upon the natural way of Islam.

47.title: Surah Al-Falaq
47.meaning: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak.

48.title: Blessing Loss Protection
48.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from the loss of Your blessings.

49.title: La Hawla Prayer
49.meaning: There is no power nor strength except with Allah.

50.title: Heart Firmness
50.meaning: O Turner of hearts! Keep my heart firm upon Your religion.

51.title: Dajjal Fitnah Protection
51.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from the trial of the Dajjal.

52.title: Goodness in Both Worlds
52.meaning: Our Lord! Give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter.

53.title: Increase in Knowledge
53.meaning: My Lord! Increase me in knowledge.

54.title: Forgiveness of Sins
54.meaning: Our Lord! Forgive us our sins.

55.title: Straight Path
55.meaning: Guide us to the straight path.

56.title: Mercy Prayer
56.meaning: My Lord! Have mercy on us.

57.title: Patience Prayer
57.meaning: Our Lord! Pour upon us patience.

58.title: Ease Not Difficulty
58.meaning: My Lord! Make it easy, not difficult.

60.title: Among Righteous
60.meaning: Admit me by Your mercy among Your righteous servants.

61.title: Blessing Gratitude
61.meaning: My Lord! Inspire me to be grateful for Your blessings.

62.title: Hearing and Knowing
62.meaning: Our Lord! Accept from us. Indeed You are the Hearing, the Knowing.

63.title: Pardon Prayer
63.meaning: O Allah! You are Pardoning and love to pardon, so pardon me.

64.title: Qunut Prayer
64.meaning: O Allah! Guide me among those You have guided.

65.title: Master of Forgiveness
65.meaning: O Allah! You are my Lord. There is no deity except You.

66.title: Travel Prayer
66.meaning: Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us.

67.title: Meal Prayer
67.meaning: O Allah! Bless us in what You have provided.

68.title: Visiting the Sick
68.meaning: No harm, it will be a purification, if Allah wills.

69.title: Refuge from Satan
69.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan.

70.title: Grave Torment Protection
70.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave.

71.title: Mosque Entry Prayer
71.meaning: O Allah! Open the gates of Your mercy for me.

72.title: Mosque Exit Prayer
72.meaning: O Allah! I ask You from Your bounty.

73.title: Post-Ablution Testimony
73.meaning: I bear witness there is no deity except Allah.

74.title: Funeral Prayer
74.meaning: O Allah! Forgive him and have mercy on him.

75.title: Seeking Mercy
75.meaning: O Allah! I ask You by Your mercy.

76.title: Friday Salawat
76.meaning: O Allah! Send blessings upon our master Muhammad.

77.title: Tasbeeh
77.meaning: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Allah.

78.title: Intercession Prayer
78.meaning: O Allah! Grant us the intercession of Your Prophet.

80.title: Night of Power Prayer
80.meaning: O Allah! You are Pardoning and love to pardon, so pardon me.

81.title: Reaching Ramadan
81.meaning: O Allah! Let us reach Ramadan.

82.title: Tawheed Dhikr
82.meaning: There is no deity except Allah, alone without partner.

83.title: Eid Takbir
83.meaning: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, there is no deity except Allah.

84.title: Talbiyah
84.meaning: Here I am, O Allah, here I am at Your service.

85.title: New Moon Prayer
85.meaning: O Allah! Let it appear over us with blessing and faith.

86.title: Sha'ban Prayer
86.meaning: O Allah! Bless us in Sha'ban.

87.title: Blessed Days Prayer
87.meaning: O Allah! Make these days blessed for us.

90.title: Forgiveness and Mercy
90.meaning: My Lord! Forgive me and have mercy on me.

91.title: Self-Wrong Confession
91.meaning: O Allah! I have wronged myself.

92.title: Adam's Repentance
92.meaning: Our Lord! We have wronged ourselves.

93.title: Best of Forgivers
93.meaning: My Lord! Forgive and have mercy. You are the best of those who show mercy.

94.title: Purification from Sins
94.meaning: O Allah! Wash me from my sins.

95.title: Living and Sustaining
95.meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer.

96.title: Pardoning and Generous
96.meaning: O Allah! You are Pardoning and Generous.

97.title: Forgetting and Mistakes
97.meaning: Our Lord! Do not blame us if we forget or make mistakes.

98.title: Cleansing from Sins
98.meaning: O Allah! Cleanse me from sins.

101.title: Subhanaka
101.meaning: Glory be to You, O Allah! Praise be to You.

102.title: Surah Al-Fatiha
102.meaning: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds.

103.title: Ruku Tasbeeh
103.meaning: Glory be to my Lord, the Magnificent.

104.title: Sujood Tasbeeh
104.meaning: Glory be to my Lord, the Most High.

106.title: Allahumma Salli
106.meaning: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad.

107.title: Allahumma Barik
107.meaning: O Allah! Bestow blessings upon Muhammad.

108.title: Rabbana Prayer
108.meaning: Our Lord! Give us good in this world.

109.title: Salam
109.meaning: Peace and mercy of Allah be upon you.

110.title: Post-Salam Prayer
110.meaning: O Allah! You are Peace (the Source of Peace).

111.title: Qunut Prayer
111.meaning: O Allah! We seek Your help.

112.title: Prophet Yunus Prayer
112.meaning: There is no deity except You. Glory be to You. Indeed I have been of the wrongdoers.

113.title: Grief Prayer
113.meaning: O Allah! I am Your servant.

114.title: Sufficiency Verse
114.meaning: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity except Him.

115.title: Hope for Mercy
115.meaning: O Allah! I hope for Your mercy.

116.title: Living and Sustaining
116.meaning: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer! I seek help through Your mercy.

117.title: Difficulty to Ease
117.meaning: O Allah! Nothing is easy except what You make easy.

118.title: Grief Protection
118.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from grief.

119.title: Calamity Prayer
119.meaning: Indeed we belong to Allah and to Him we shall return.

120.title: Rain of Patience
120.meaning: Our Lord! Pour upon us patience.

121.title: Allah is With Me
121.meaning: Allah is with me, Allah is watching over me.

122.title: Hope Verse
122.meaning: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah.

123.title: Tawakkul Verse
123.meaning: And upon Allah let the believers rely.
